name: fantasy-sports-toolkit

plugins.name: fantasy-manager
plugins.description: Sport-agnostic skills for running a fantasy team -- lineups, waivers, and trades across football, basketball, baseball, hockey, and more -- bundled with the context MCPs (live scores, Reddit news, web fetch) that help regardless of which fantasy platform you use. Add a data provider (e.g. the sleeper plugin) for your roster.

plugins.name: sleeper
plugins.description: Sleeper fantasy data provider (MCP) -- covers Sleeper's supported sports (NFL and NBA). Read-only, no API key. Install alongside fantasy-manager to give the skills live data. The yahoo provider slots in the same way for Yahoo leagues, and a future espn provider would too.

plugins.name: yahoo
plugins.description: Yahoo Fantasy data provider (MCP), covering Yahoo's fantasy sports (NFL, NHL, NBA, MLB) with read and write access (leagues, rosters, matchups, free agents, set-lineup, add/drop, trades). Needs a one-time Yahoo OAuth login. Install alongside fantasy-manager to give the skills live data, the same way the sleeper provider does.

description: Sport-agnostic fantasy agent tooling for every harness -- lineups, waivers, and trades across football, basketball, baseball, hockey, and more. Install the provider-agnostic skills, then add the data provider you use.
